description: Truly minimal capability for the detached hazakura agent window. Scoped to the agent window label only and grants no core/plugin permissions, so the child webview cannot emit events, manipulate windows or webviews, or touch the menu / tray / dialog subsystems. The agent window can still call the project's custom IPC commands because custom `#[tauri::command]` functions are auto-allowlisted for any window listed in a capability file; the server-side caller-window check in `src-tauri/src/lib.rs` (ensure_main_window / ensure_label_is_main_or_agent) is the second layer that restricts the agent window to the four Agent session commands it needs (get_agent_workbench_session_state, stop_agent_workbench_session, write_agent_workbench_session_input, resize_agent_workbench_terminal) plus set_agent_window_theme (so the agent window can push its mount-time theme + cross-window storage-event themes to Rust, and so the main window can push theme changes into the open agent window in real time). All other custom commands (file I/O, workspace tree, save, menu state, theme state, app restart, etc.) stay main-only. The main window's capability is unchanged.
